channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jets and QB Justin Fields agree to a 2-year, $40 million deal, AP source says
item.description: Justin Fields was passed over by the New York Jets four years ago in the NFL draft. Now he's expected to be their No. 1 quarterback. Fields and the Jets agreed Monday to a two-year contract worth $40 million, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saunders earns first team All-Big 12 honors
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fresh off leading No. 17 BYU to its eighth straight win on Saturday, Richie Saunders was named the Big 12 Most Improved Player and claimed First Team All-Big honors. Egor Demin earned honorable mention all-conference and all-freshman accolades.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Eddie George relishes challenge in taking over at Bowling Green
item.description: BOWLING GREEN, Ohio (AP) — Eddie George was pondering the next steps in his burgeoning career as a college football coach while driving back from the NFL scouting combine. He got a sign in the most unlikely of places.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mo Vaughn, 12-year MLB veteran, admits using HGH to extend career
item.description: Ex-Boston Red Sox slugger Mo Vaughn admitted injecting human growth hormone into his degenerative knee to help extend his 12-year MLB career.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Justin Fields agrees to 2-year deal with Jets: reports
item.description: The New York Jets have a new starting quarterback, as Justin Fields, the ex-Chicago Bears and Pittsburgh Steelers signal caller, agreed to a 2-year deal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Duke ends Auburn's 8-week stay at No. 1 in AP Top 25; Oregon, Illini return as postseason heats up
item.description: Duke ended Auburn's eight-week stay at No. 1 in the AP Top 25 men's college basketball poll on Monday, while the Tigers dropped to third behind Houston as all three programs began preparing for their conference tournaments.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Male practice player on women's college basketball team gets caught gambling: report
item.description: A male practice squad player on Mississippi State University's women's basketball team reportedly violated NCAA rules by betting on sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Super-sectional Monday: A look at Chicagoland prep boys basketball teams playing for trip to IHSA State Tournament
item.description: One of the best days of the Illinois high school sports calendar has arrived. It's super-sectional Monday for boys basketball.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Khalil Mack staying with Chargers. Deal is for 1 year, $18 million, AP sources say
item.description: Khalil Mack will remain with the Los Angeles Chargers after agreeing to a one-year deal on Monday. Mack's $18 million salary for the 2025 season will be fully guaranteed according to two people familiar with the negotiations.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers free agency tracker: tight end added; Ward, Banks Hufanga, Mitchell, Moore exit
item.description: The 49ers are losing running back Elijah Mitchell and offensive tackle Jaylon Moore to the Kansas City Chiefs as NFL free agency talks open.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: DK Metcalf is leaving Seattle for Pittsburgh with a new deal in tow, AP sources say
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — The Pittsburgh Steelers finally have their established big-play wide receiver. The Seattle Seahawks are sending two-time Pro Bowler D.K. Metcalf to Pittsburgh for at least a second-round pick, sources with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl stars Josh Sweat and Milton Williams headline a list of NFL free agents
item.description: NFL teams can start reshaping their rosters by signing free agents this week. There’s plenty of attention on the quarterbacks, including Sam Darnold, Russell Wilson and Justin Fields.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Allende scores to lead Miami past Charlotte 1-0 with Messi again watching from the bench
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Tadeo Allende scored 17 seconds into the second half and Inter Miami won its third straight match without Lionel Messi, beating Charlotte FC 1-0 on Sunday. Messi has not played since a win over Sporting Kansas City on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man United draws 1-1 with Arsenal after brilliant late save denies Bruno Fernandes
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — A stunning double save from David Raya denied Bruno Fernandes a dramatic late winner for Manchester United against Arsenal in the Premier League on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 40 as Thunder top Nuggets 127-103 in matchup of West leaders
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 40 points and the Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the Denver Nuggets 127-103 on Sunday in a matchup between the top two teams in the Western Conference.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utes win another NCAA skiing national title
item.description: HANOVER, N.H. (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah returned to the pinnacle of the collegiate skiing world on Saturday as the Utes won their 17th national title all-time—and fifth in the last six seasons—with the conclusion of the 2025 NCAA Championships.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Volleyball: Cathedral Catholic 3, Granite Hills 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys Volleyball action on Wednesday night Cathedral Catholic beat Granite Hills in three sets.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox reassign top 2 prospects to minor-league camp, team announces Thursday
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. — The White Sox reassigned two of their top prospects to minor-league camp, one a west suburban native, the team announced Thursday morning prior to its spring training game against the San Francisco Giants.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Reports: Bears trade for all-pro Chiefs OL Joe Thuney
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have reportedly traded for four-time Super Bowl champion guard Joe Thuney from the Chiefs. According to multiple reports, the Bears are sending back a 2026 fourth-round pick for the 32-year-old guard.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Flo Rida set to perform postgame concert at Rate Field this summer
item.description: Flo Rida will perform at a postgame concert at Rate Field following the White Sox game versus the San Francisco Giants on Friday, June 27 at 6:40 p.m. CT, with on-field Postgame Concert passes available to single-game ticket purchasers and White Sox season ticket holders.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Filipowski scores 25, but Jazz lose to Detroit, 134-106
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cade Cunningham had 29 points, nine assists and four steals, and the Detroit Pistons beat the Utah Jazz 134-106 on Monday night for their 10th win in 11 games. The Jazz committed 27 turnovers end a season-long nine-gam homestand with a record of 3-6.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
